metadata.description: Ezoic's internal marketing plugins. For use by Ezoic employees and contracted partners only. Not for public distribution.

plugins.name: ezoic-marketing
plugins.description: Ezoic's marketing playbook for Claude Code — multi-channel content, sales materials, decks, landing pages, objections, campaigns, positioning, brand review. Loads the canonical Ezoic brand system from iheartezoic.com (MCP / API / llms.txt) and shared references; enforces it across every output. Internal + partner use only.
